title: Archon + Jira: Drag a Ticket, Get a Pull Request (Live Build)
summary: Archon is an AI coding framework that triggers automated workflows from multiple platforms including GitHub, Slack, Telegram, Discord, and Jira. It integrates with Jira to automatically fix bugs, open pull requests, and post results back to tickets.
